name: Pennywise (2025)
description:
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐲 𝐦𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐃𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐲, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚 𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐫 ꜱᴏᴍᴇᴛʜɪɴɢ 𝐬𝐞𝐞𝐦𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭...

🎈

𝓦𝓮𝓵𝓬𝓸𝓶𝓮 𝓽𝓸 𝓓𝓮𝓻𝓻𝔂

🎈

(I know these two greetings aren't the best, maybe responses are stupid, but I'm working on it to be better, please be patient and post comments if anything is not working properly)

Update: Jesus Christ guys we get 36k I'm so so happy😭 I'll be working on Google docs to send me suggestions to make bots, so stay tuned my little freaks🎈
